subcodes.first_line: O thou favored servant of the Beauty of Abha! Though outwardly matters may appear disordered, yet praise be unto God, inwardly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقرب جمال ابهی هر چند امور بظاهر پریشان گردد ولی الحمد لله در باطن
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort
